comments: TV interviews Dave Mustaine of Megadeth on the telephone from Toronto.
There is a competition where listeners are invited to nominate their favourite riff of all time

The Rachel's breakdown song featured in the Rock War session in this episode appeared as a slightly different version with a different chorus titled 'summer song' on the demo tape they were selling at around the same time as this, I'm not sure which version came first the demo I got or the version in this show.

sessions.artist: Israfel (former Rock War winners from Newton Le Willows)

track_listing.track: 'Temple Of Rock' (LP - Down Fall The Good Guys') Def American
Intro - Take It Off The Top, TV introduces the line-up for the show
'Gotta Kill Captain Stupid' (LP - The Art Of Rebellion) Epic
'Low Life In High Places' (LP - Laughing On Judgement Day) EMI
24-7 Spyz - 'Last Call' (LP - Strength In Numbers) EastWest
Tommy counts down the Top 30 Hard Rock / Heavy Metal singles

'I Ain't No Nice Guy' (LP - March Or Die) Epic
'All I Want Is You' (LP - Waking Up The Neighbours) A&M
'The Heart Of The Devil' (LP - Danzig III How The Gods Kill) Def American
Mama's Boys - 'What You See Is What You Get' (missing from recording)
'Symphony Of Destruction' (LP - Symphony Of Destruction) Capitol
